title: Art appraisers in San Francisco, California

location.name: Art appraisers in San Francisco, California
location.description: Compare art appraisers in San Francisco, California.

listedAppraisers.name: Cederwall Fine Art
listedAppraisers.description: Bay Area's Best Resource for Fine American Paintings of the 19th & 20th Centuries. Consultation & Education Services available.

listedAppraisers.name: Czudej McDonough
listedAppraisers.description: Czudej McDonough provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Postwar Art, Contemporary, Impressionist, Modern Art, Photography, Prints, Litigation Support, Collateral Lending. With Decades of combined experience experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: John Pence Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: John Pence Gallery is one of San Francisco's premier academic realist galleries, providing art appraisal and consultation services.

listedAppraisers.name: Lost Art Salon
listedAppraisers.description: Gallery specializing in the rediscovery of historically significant artists who have been lost to time. Our vast collection reflects the major movements of the Modern era.

listedAppraisers.name: Mary Peck Art Advisory
listedAppraisers.description: Mary Peck Art Advisory provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Modern Art, Contemporary Art, Charitable Donations, Copyright Infringement, IRS-Compliant Valuations. With 27 years experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Modernism Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Modernism Gallery has been a San Francisco institution for nearly five decades, specializing in modern and contemporary art with expert appraisal services.

listedAppraisers.name: Montgomery Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Montgomery Gallery specializes in fine American and European paintings, offering expert appraisal and consultation services.

listedAppraisers.name: Newton Fine Art Appraisal
listedAppraisers.description: Newton Fine Art Appraisal provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Paintings, Prints, Sculpture, Digital Art, Insurance Appraisals, Estate Appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Reilly Clark Fine Art & Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Reilly Clark Fine Art & Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Contemporary Art, Antiquities, Insurance/Tax Appraisals, Estate Liquidation. With 4+ years experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Rosalie Wardell
listedAppraisers.description: Rosalie Wardell offers art appraisal services serving San Francisco, CA. FAIR directory data indicates specialties in Art - 19th Century, Art - Impressionist & Modern, Paintings - Impressionist & Modern, Photography - 20th Century, Sculpture, ISA AM, with direct website contact available for project-specific valuation requests.

listedAppraisers.name: Serge Sorokko Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Formed in 1984, Serge Sorokko Gallery specializes as an art gallery and dealers of paintings, offering fine collection appraisals.
